summary: Iteration 75 - Testing TWO NEW features: 1) Planning tab 'Reservations du mois' cards below Gantt chart, 2) Expandable alert cards in Gestion tab. ALL FEATURES WORKING CORRECTLY.
critical_code_review_comments: Planning tab 'Reservations du mois' section correctly implemented with planningCards useMemo
Cards show vehicle name, client name, dates (dd/MM format), duration (Xj), status badge
Cards are clickable and open ReservationActionModal
Card count badge shows correct number (e.g., '4 resultat(s)')
Gantt status filter (Tous/Confirmes/En cours/Retards) correctly filters the card list
Vehicle search also filters the card list
Gestion tab alert cards show correct counts
Alert cards have chevron icons indicating expandable state
Clicking alert card expands to show full list of items
Only one alert can be expanded at a time (accordion behavior)
Clicking same alert card again collapses it
Expanded items are clickable and open ReservationActionModal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested two new features: 1) Planning tab reservation cards below Gantt chart with filtering, 2) Expandable alert cards in Gestion tab. All features passed. The app uses localStorage for auth token - set token before navigating to protected routes.

planning_tab_reservation_cards.reservations_du_mois_section_visible: PASS - Section appears below Gantt chart with list icon and header
planning_tab_reservation_cards.card_content: PASS - Shows vehicle name, client name, dates (dd/MM), duration (Xj), status badge
planning_tab_reservation_cards.cards_clickable: PASS - Clicking card opens ReservationActionModal with full details
planning_tab_reservation_cards.status_filter_sync: PASS - Gantt status filter (Tous/Confirmes/En cours/Retards) filters cards
planning_tab_reservation_cards.vehicle_search_filter: PASS - Vehicle search input filters the card list
planning_tab_reservation_cards.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Aucune reservation pour cette periode' when no results

gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.vehicule_non_rendu_card: PASS - Shows count '6 vehicule(s) en retard' with chevron icon
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.paiement_en_attente_card: PASS - Shows count '8 paiement(s) en attente' with chevron icon
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.client_en_retard_card: PASS - Shows count '6 client(s) en retard' with chevron icon
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.expand_vehicule_non_rendu: PASS - Expands to show 'Vehicules non rendus (6)' with full list
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.expand_paiement_en_attente: PASS - Expands to show 'Paiements en attente (8)' with CHF amounts
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.expand_client_en_retard: PASS - Expands to show 'Clients en retard (6)' with +Xj indicators
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.accordion_behavior: PASS - Only one alert expanded at a time
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.collapse_on_reclick: PASS - Clicking same card collapses it
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.expanded_item_clickable: PASS - Clicking item in expanded list opens ReservationActionModal
gestion_tab_expandable_alerts.chevron_state_indicator: PASS - Chevron points up when expanded, down when collapsed

playwright_tests_performed: Admin login with admin-geneva@logirent.ch via localStorage token
Verify Gestion tab loads with KPIs, activity feed, tables
Verify alert cards visible at bottom: Vehicule non rendu, Paiement en attente, Client en retard
Click 'Vehicule non rendu' - verify expanded list with 6 items
Click 'Paiement en attente' - verify expanded list with 8 items and CHF amounts
Verify accordion behavior - only one alert expanded at a time
Click 'Client en retard' - verify expanded list with +Xj indicators
Verify Gantt chart loads with vehicles and reservation bars
Verify 'Reservations du mois' section below Gantt with card count badge
Verify cards show vehicle, client, dates, duration, status badge
Click 'En cours' filter - verify card count changes from 4 to 1
Click on planning card - verify ReservationActionModal opens
